3 suppliers were contacted.

BudgetGPU Direct offered RTX 3050 at €210 with 10-day delivery and 1-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.
Workstation Parts GmbH offered RTX 3060 Compact at €310 with 3-day delivery and 1-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.

Reason: Best balance of compatibility, price, delivery, warranty, and risk.
